_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: We found varying amounts of mild to moderate degeneration of seminiferous tubules in all Nf1+/- males
details: Mild to moderate seminiferous tubule degeneration observed in all Nf1+/- males, including detachment of germinal epithelium, vacuolation, and exfoliation of immature spermatids
